title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.300 - Coroner to administer an oath to the jurors
text:
58.300.  Coroner to administer an oath to the jurors. — The coroner shall administer an oath or affirmation to the jurors, in the following form:
(RSMo 1939 § 13235) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11616; 1919 § 5924; 1909 § 2929
